query:
-- Step 1: Propagate tiab_customers internalCustomerExternalId to tiab_services
UPDATE tiab_services ts
JOIN tiab_customers tc ON ts.tiabCustomerId = tc.tiabCustomerId
SET ts.reconStatus = 'customer_matched'
WHERE tc.internalCustomerExternalId IS NOT NULL
  AND tc.matchType NOT IN ('internal_test', 'internal_orphan');

-- Step 2: Check how many tiab_services now have a customer match path
SELECT 
  ts.reconStatus,
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM tiab_services ts
GROUP BY ts.reconStatus;

-- Step 1: Propagate tiab_customers internalCustomerExternalId to tiab_services
UPDATE tiab_services ts
JOIN tiab_customers tc ON ts.tiabCustomerId = tc.tiabCustomerId
SET ts.reconStatus = 'customer_matched'
WHERE tc.internalCustomerExternalId IS NOT NULL
  AND tc.matchType NOT IN ('internal_test', 'internal_orphan');

-- Step 2: Check how many tiab_services now have a customer match path
SELECT 
  ts.reconStatus,
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM tiab_services ts
GROUP BY ts.reconStatus;
